description:
Implement analytics and cookie consent only after selecting a vendor/path that respects the thin-PHI boundary.

**Scope**
- Decide whether launch needs analytics at all beyond server logs.
- If analytics are added, ensure no PHI, questionnaire answers, condition-specific health context, or MDI workflow URLs are collected.
- Add cookie consent or preference UI matching the privacy policy.
- Keep any vendor BAA/compliance review documented if PHI could ever be in scope.

**Acceptance**
- Analytics events are reviewed for PHI leakage.
- Cookie consent behavior matches the privacy policy.
- No external analytics script runs on intake/questionnaire pages unless explicitly approved.
title: Analytics and cookie consent under thin-PHI rules
